prompt: Create a cinematic film still in a 16:9 widescreen frame, showing a solitary man from behind as he stands in a rectangular doorway and turns his head over his right shoulder in a tense profile glance. He is a white man in his 30s with slicked-back dark blond hair, wearing a dark navy or black jacket with a broad collar; his body fills the lower center of the frame, mostly seen from the back, with only the side of his face visible. The camera is positioned slightly behind and to his left, at chest height, creating an over-the-shoulder, surveillance-like composition. The foreground wall around the doorway is rough beige stucco with strong tactile texture, occupying most of the left and right sides of the image. Beyond the doorway is a warmly lit yellow interior room with cream walls and a built-in bookshelf in the background containing indistinct books and small framed objects. Use moody neo-noir lighting with a sickly warm yellow interior glow contrasting against the dark jacket, shallow depth of field, subtle film grain, realistic skin and fabric texture, muted green-gold color grading, soft shadows, and the look of a single frame from a serious psychological thriller. No visible text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptEn: Create a cinematic film still in a 16:9 widescreen frame, showing a solitary man from behind as he stands in a rectangular doorway and turns his head over his right shoulder in a tense profile glance. He is a white man in his 30s with slicked-back dark blond hair, wearing a dark navy or black jacket with a broad collar; his body fills the lower center of the frame, mostly seen from the back, with only the side of his face visible. The camera is positioned slightly behind and to his left, at chest height, creating an over-the-shoulder, surveillance-like composition. The foreground wall around the doorway is rough beige stucco with strong tactile texture, occupying most of the left and right sides of the image. Beyond the doorway is a warmly lit yellow interior room with cream walls and a built-in bookshelf in the background containing indistinct books and small framed objects. Use moody neo-noir lighting with a sickly warm yellow interior glow contrasting against the dark jacket, shallow depth of field, subtle film grain, realistic skin and fabric texture, muted green-gold color grading, soft shadows, and the look of a single frame from a serious psychological thriller. No visible text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptZh: 创作一张 16:9 宽银幕比例的电影剧照，展示 一名孤独的男子 的背影，他站在矩形门口，转头越过右肩，投以紧张的侧脸一瞥。他是一位 30 多岁的白人男性，留着向后梳的深金色头发，穿着一件深海军蓝或黑色的宽领夹克；他的身体占据了画面下方中心位置，主要呈现背影，仅露出侧脸。摄像机位于他身后偏左侧，胸部高度，营造出一种越肩视角、类似监控的构图。门口周围的前景墙壁是粗糙的米色灰泥，具有强烈的触感纹理，占据了图像左右两侧的大部分空间。门后是一个光线温暖的黄色室内房间，墙壁呈奶油色，背景中有一个内置书架，上面摆放着模糊的书籍和小型相框物品。采用情绪化的新黑色电影（neo-noir）灯光，室内病态的暖黄色光芒与深色夹克形成对比，浅景深，细腻的胶片颗粒感，真实的皮肤和织物纹理，柔和的绿金色调，柔和的阴影，呈现出一部严肃心理惊悚片中单帧画面的质感。无可见文字，无水印，无其他人物。
